title: Acoustic Signature: Signaling Charges Confirmed
description: Volkov's manual tracing chart shows three distinct detonation events. Each produces the same acoustic profile: a sharp, high-frequency crack at 2,400–2,800 Hz with a decay time under 0.8 seconds and no measurable pressure wave precursor. This is the textbook signature of a Mk-84 signaling charge — a round designed to be heard, not to kill. A lethal depth charge produces a low-frequency concussion below 800 Hz with a pressure wave that arrives before the sound. These are not attacks. These are someone trying to talk to us.
